name: 隱忍扮豬吃虎女主
description: 核心吸引力在於巨大的身份反差——明明是世界首富卻甘願扮演底層，面對羞辱選擇隱忍而非當場翻臉，讓觀眾積蓄情緒等待爆發。她的善良和堅韌讓觀眾產生強烈的保護欲和認同感。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I didn't want to scare him away, so I lied about who I was and pretended to be a delivery girl. For 3 years, I've secretly supported his startup business. / Arguing isn't my thing. Luckily, I have others to fight my fights.
examples.context: 核心吸引力在於巨大的身份反差——明明是世界首富卻甘願扮演底層，面對羞辱選擇隱忍而非當場翻臉，讓觀眾積蓄情緒等待爆發。她的善良和堅韌讓觀眾產生強烈的保護欲和認同感。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Working as a janitor here is honestly way more interesting than being a prized employee at Shiang Nai International. / She's the ays of Shiang Nai International. / A princess should be pampered and loved by all.
examples.context: 表面是清潔工，實則是頂級豪門千金和國際企業繼承人。擁有頂級專業能力卻甘願隱忍，為愛隱藏身份三年。核心吸引力在於反差萌和觀眾對「身份揭露那一刻」的強烈期待。
